com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleBooleanValidator

Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensibleBooleanValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleBooleanValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  BooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value.
    interface  PrimitiveBooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean value.

  • Uses of ExtensibleBooleanValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleBooleanValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  BooleanValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of BooleanValidator.
    class  BooleanValidatorNoOp
    A BooleanValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveBooleanValidator.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanValidatorNoOp
    A PrimitiveBooleanValidator that does nothing.
